item.title: I'm sorry but I too couldn't help but laugh!! Their ignorance knows no bounds lmfao!

item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
your beloved child is technically now also incarcerated sir
jizz me on smackdog if you want to talk more about this
mmm hmm
used to do this often, it's delicious
NEW YORK CITY??!?
finally we get a new sin
that's unsettling
cute calico
i guess
i want to eat that vintage mcd's food and ice cream obv
Johnny Cash 1961
and why shouldn't we
well.. yes and no
cast it into the fire
bc Ozzy loves wearing tshirts that just say 'Ozzy'
both not real
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Spillage
item.description: 'Thankfully Kurosawa never actually told any of the actors exactly how much blood was going to burst out of the pipe and everyone on set assumed that a geyser of blood was supposed to explode out of the guy’s chest because Akira Kurosawa didn’t make mistakes. The production on the other hand did and assumed that Kurosawa would want to do another take because of how fucking stupid and comical the effect looked. The thing is, Kurosawa reportedly loved the effect and absolutely refused to do another take, insisting that the shot was perfect as it was.' https://screenrant.com/akira-kurosawa-sanjuro-mistake-change-action-movies-violence/
item.dc:creator: AliceWins

item.title: PSA: Saying someone from a minority group is "one of the good ones" or "not like the others" is not a compliment
item.description: And if you don't know, now you know. (The woman is Sweet Anita, a Twitch streamer and Youtuber)
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer

item.title: 45 lbs weight loss
item.description: Look at my face, y’all! I don’t see the face progress irl but I really do see it in these pictures! ETA: this has taken about 10 months so it’s been slow. I haven’t done anything exciting except tracking calories in Lifesum and (obviously) eaten less. Haven’t work out much at all but I’m hoping to improve on that. :)
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: 76% of an Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Artist: Ryota Kuwakubo https://www.ryotakuwakubo.com/
Ólafur Waage https://www.instagram.com/olafurw/
B. Dylan Hollis https://www.instagram.com/bdylanhollis
--- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag Edit: Ugh, I didn't realize the volume was so different on some of the videos. I TRIED, OKAY. Incidentally, if someone knows of a free website for adjusting the volume of a video, pls let me know, thx!

item.title: I made Sammy a cake for his 10th birthday and he didn’t believe me it was for him
item.description: He turned 10 last May, so he’s almost 11 now! and yes he’ll get another cake he earned it! I made the cake myself, it was pumpkin and applesauce, with a peanut butter frosting. and the bone treat on top is his CBD treat for his arthritis. Once he believed me that he was allowed to eat it he went to town. he’s a goddamn 13/10 good boi. #cute #dog #doggo #great_dane

item.title: Yeah, I'm a PC player
item.description: P.S. I would like to share with you that apart from posting on Imgur all day, I also am making a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game that is (hopefully) equally redicilous. Please wishslist, as it helps small devs like us instead of greedy corporations: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Since it's Friday, have a great weekend! Don't forget to be a hydrohomie, go on a hike, and if you can, go watch Dune Part 2. The passion with which that movie was made is insane. Respect for everyone involved.

item.dc:creator: pez2005

item.title: Going for a walk with penguins
item.description: "The penguins at Basel Zoo take a daily walk through the Zoo during winter, starting point is their outdoor enclosure. The birds are accompanied by a zoo keeper. Cool temperatures are very important for penguins as their high level of insulation means that they can overheat quickly. For this reason, we only bring the animals outside under certain conditions. The temperature must be below 10°C. If it is raining heavily, the penguins stay in the vivarium. We decide on a daily basis whether to complete the walk, after careful consideration. Penguin walk: approximately 11 a.m., generally every day from November to February, start at the vivarium's bridge." https://www.zoobasel.ch/en/zoobesuch/r/5/fuetterung-and-pinguinspaziergang
item.dc:creator: AjKaramba

item.title: Meme Dump 37 out of 200
item.description:
Hey imgur ~ hope you guys had a good weekend and Monday. Remember to cry and poop on corporate time ♡
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Classic covid lock down meme
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Like sleeping
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Bet you this is gonna get my post marked as "mature" ;-;
Maybe 6
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Where are they at though? ;-;
.
.
.
.
Too true lol
Thanks for joining me in another phone cleaning meme dumparoo ♡ #memes #memedump #funny #mental_health #dank_memes #remembertostayhydrated

item.title: Billionaires gonna billionaire.
item.description: Billionaires are not our friends. They are the modern iteration of “Landed Aristocracy” from feudal times. We are their serfs and tenants. There’s a reason they’re called LANDLORDS. When will we revolt? https://flip.it/v3KFGj
item.dc:creator: Fleegla
